title: Skills plus MCP Integration and 2026 Evolution · Protocol Recall
summary: Ship a skill-driven MCP workflow across Codex and Claude with migration controls. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a production skill and MCP integration package after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use a skill to define the workflow while MCP provides narrow live capabilities.
Declare skill tool dependencies and provide actionable setup and fallback behavior.
Run trigger, tool selection, permission, error, and outcome evals in both clients.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

steps.title: Retrieve the complete evidence cycle
steps.instruction: Order the Workflow Orchestration evidence cycle before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Workflow Orchestration assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: Use a skill to define the workflow while MCP provides narrow live capabilities. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Check preconditions, perform the operation in an inspectable order, then verify the result and a boundary case.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: agent ext integration capstone. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies Workflow Orchestration, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a production skill and MCP integration package.

stimulus.title: Integration Defense case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case derived from this module: agent ext integration capstone. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: A technically working demo is a complete extension product.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Defend scope, trust, maintainability, context cost, and operator experience. Artifact under review: a production skill and MCP integration package.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Integration Defense, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Integration Defense applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Defend scope, trust, maintainability, context cost, and operator experience.
